testimonials.name: Oliver Rolfe Landscapes
testimonials.quote: A very reliable and professional company that we have been using for many years.

testimonials.name: Capitol Building Services Limited
testimonials.quote: Every job Waste Management do for us is always prompt and efficient and we would thoroughly recommend them.

testimonials.name: Julie O
testimonials.quote: Waste Management sorted out our skip permit and did a really good job over the 2 weeks with regular changes and the ease of payment on the phone was really good – nice team of people.

testimonials.name: Jacqueline Palmer
testimonials.quote: Excellent. Always on time, easy to communicate with & great at reminding me when we need to renew permits! Would happily recommend Waste Management.
